description: Update the 'Extra' field for three legal references in your Juris-M library with specific CSL variables to ensure correct citation formatting. Add 'original-date: 1897' to 'The Path of the Law' (Holmes), 'DOI: 10.2307/1122547' to 'Constitutional Fact Review' (Monaghan), and 'citation-key: poe_torts_1971' to 'The Due Process Clause and the Substantive Law of Torts' (Poe).
